*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-2Y|Edge runtime does not support Node.js 'crypto' module>*
Events: 3 ┬╖ New ┬╖ Severity: Critical ┬╖ 2 users affected on `GET /proxy`
Replace `createHmac` from `crypto` in `impersonation.ts` with a Web Crypto API equivalent тАФ the file is imported by middleware which runs on the Edge runtime.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-916/fix-nodejs-crypto-module-used-in-edge-middleware-impersonationts|DEV-916> тАФ Fix Node.js crypto module used in Edge middleware (impersonation.ts) ┬╖ Priority: Urgent ┬╖ Labels: Bug, L

_Also covers MIT-MAP-2Z (2 events, `GET /_error`, same root cause тАФ folded into DEV-916)_

*<https://yung-tang-chou.sentry.io/issues/MIT-MAP-30|No intl context found тАФ /brands listing page>*
Events: 1 ┬╖ New ┬╖ Severity: Moderate ┬╖ 0 users
Trace which client component calls `useTranslations()` outside the ISR/streaming provider scope; apply `NextIntlClientProvider` fallback as done for the homepage.
Ticket: <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-917/investigate-missing-intl-context-on-brands-listing-page|DEV-917> тАФ Investigate missing intl context on /brands listing page ┬╖ Priority: High ┬╖ Labels: Bug, M

Events: 1 ┬╖ New ┬╖ Severity: Moderate ┬╖ 0 users (first seen 18 min before triage)
Add `if (!user?.id)` guard before calling `resolveDashboardBrand`; add assertion in `getUserBrands` to reject empty-string IDs early.
